title: MC Eternal
description: A modpack that tweak Minecraft to something I'd want to play forever
body: A modpack that adds all the quality of life changes I love, that tweak the flow and feel of Minecraft to something I'd want to play forever. Changes include but are not limited to: End progression, enchanting rework, create + addons, farmers delight + addons, and origins. **THE TITLE WILL BUG IF YOU DONT CHANGE THE GUI SCALE. 3 FOR 1080p 4 FOR 1440p**
